chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 77 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.280/2022 2. For hearing of main case 20.02.2025 Mr. Anas Makhdoom, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondents No.3 & 5 Mr. Raza Ali advocate holds brief for Mr. Imran Ali Mithani, advocate for respondent No.4 Ms. Sadia Ashraf advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Qureshi, advocate for respondent No.6 Mr. Aamir Raza, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel assessment order has already been passed and the petitioner shall assail the same in the statutory hierarchy, if so advised. Learned counsel states that fate of the amounts secured before the Collector may be subject to the conclusion of proceedings before the Collector Appeals, provided that such proceedings are initiated within one week hereof. It is further sought that pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent department articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
